EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF GUH-SIESEL, LUCIA
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $297.18 RE 36636 FOR TRANSACTION W1621727D005 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO LUCIA GUH-SIESEL, WARRANT #38206760, DATED OCT-15-2021
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GUH-SIESEL, LUCIA AS TO DEFENDANT JUJARE, SRIKANTHE BOUTIKIA, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUH-SIESEL, LUCIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JUJARE, SRIKANTHE BOUTIKIA, LLC. $105.00 PRINCIPAL, $190.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $295.00, COSTS OF CANCELLED CHECK FEE PLUS DAMAGES. JOINTLY AND SERVERALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO SRIKANTHE JUJARE, 852 GREEN ST, SF, CA 94133
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED -ORGINAL SUBPOENA NOT RETURNED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF LUCIA GUH-SIESEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SRIKANTHE JUJARE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BOUTIKIA, LLC REPRESENTED BY SRIKANTHE JUJARE, OWNER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT DOCUMENTS SUBPOENAED BY THE PLAINTIFF FROM DEFENDANT WERE NOT PRESENTED TO HER. DEFENDANT STATES THAT HE TRIED TO PROVIDE ALL DOCUMENTS SUBPOENAED TO THE BEST OF HIS ABILITY. DEFENDANT STATES THAT SUBPOENAED DOCUMENTS FROM THE PLAINTIFF HAVE NOT BEEN RECEIVED. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT SHE HAS TRIED TO PROVIDE ALL DOCUMENTS SUBPOENAED TO THE BEST OF HER ABILITY. COURT ASK PLAINTIFF IF SHE IS WILLING TO PROCEED WITH TODAY'S TRIAL GIVEN THAT SHE HAS NOT RECEIVED ALL SUBPOENAED DOCUMENTS. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT SHE WISHES TO CONTINUE WITH TODAY'S TRIAL. MATTER IS PASSED AT 1:50 P.M. TO ALLOW DEFENDANT MORE TIME TO REVIEW PLAINTIFF'S DOCUMENTS. MATTER IS RECALLED AT 2:07 P.M. HEARING IS HELD. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS AND HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2021 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOSULY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 6-28-21)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # W1621727D005, TAG # 036636 (INCLUDES: $2.18 INTEREST FROM DATE OF JUDGMENT) BY DEFENDANT JUJARE, SRIKANTHE BOUTIKIA, LLC.
